title: The Bible in the Beginning...
writer: Christopher Fry, Jonathan Griffin, Ivo Perilli
actors: Michael Parks, Ulla Bergryd, Richard Harris
plot: Extravagant production of the first part of the book of Genesis. Its main highlights are the Garden of Eden, the first brothers, Noah and his family obeying God to build an ark for the Flood and Abraham's attempted sacrifice of Is...
awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 6 wins & 5 nominations total
